New Perplexity Computer Enterprise is insane. AI just changed forever. Perplexity just dropped something so big it makes every other AI tool look like a toy. It does not just answer questions. It runs your whole business for you. And today I am going to break down exactly how it works. This is going to blow your mind. So right now you probably use chat GPT, maybe Claude, maybe Gemini, maybe all of them. You got 10 tabs open. You are copying and pasting stuff between apps like it is 2005 and nothing talks to each other. It is a mess. We've all been there. You spend more time switching between tools than actually getting work done. And honestly, it is exhausting. But what if I told you one system could do all of that for you at the same time without you lifting a finger? That is exactly what Perplexity just built. They call it computer and the enterprise version just dropped and it is absolutely insane. Here is what makes this different from anything else out there. Most AI tools work like this. You type a prompt, you get an answer, done. That is it. One question, one answer, one model. But Plexity Computer flips that whole thing on its head. Instead of giving it a prompt, you give it a goal. Like a real goal. something like research my top five competitors, build a report, make a presentation, and email it to my team. And it just does it all of it from one single input. No babysitting, no switching tabs, no copy paste. It breaks your goal into smaller tasks. It figures out the best AI model for each task and then it runs everything start to finish. And here is the wild part. It does not just use one AI model. It uses around 20 different AI models at the same time. Think about that for a second. It picks the best model for each job. Need deep research. It sends that to one model need fast simple tasks. Different model need image generation. Another model need long document analysis. Yet another one. It is like having an entire team of AI specialists working together on your project. And you did not have to hire any of them. You did not have to train any of them. You just told the system what you wanted and it figured out the rest. This is called multimodel orchestration. And it is the future of how AI is going to work. Instead of one brain doing everything, you get 20 brains each doing what they are best at. That is a game changer. Whilst he is helping clients get more leads and customers, I am here to help you get the latest AI updates. Julian Goldie reads every comment, so make sure you comment below. Now, let me tell you about the enterprise features because this is where it gets really crazy. First, it connects to over 400 apps. Slack, notion, GitHub, Gmail, Salesforce, Snowflake, Data Bricks, all of them. That means this AI is not just thinking. It is actually doing things inside the tools your company already uses. It can send messages, pull data, update projects, create tickets all on its own. Second, it uses something called sub agents. These are specialized AI agents that each handle a different type of task. You got research agents, finance agents, data analysis agents, coordination agents, and they all work together automatically. It is like having an AI department inside your computer. Third, it has persistent memory. That means it remembers your company. It remembers what you worked on last week. It remembers your apps, your projects, your preferences. So every time you use it, it gets smarter. It gets faster. It gets better at helping you specifically. Fourth, and this is huge, it runs tasks in the background. You do not have to sit there and watch it. You can give it a job and walk away. It can run for hours, days, even months on long-term projects. You come back and the work is done. That is not a chatbot. That is a digital worker. And if you want to learn how to use AI tools like Perplexity Computer to automate your business and get more customers, join the AI profit boardroom. Now, let me give you a real example of how this works so you can see the power. Let us say you run a business and you want to launch a marketing campaign. Normally, you would spend days on this, research competitors, analyze the market, design graphics, build a landing page, write the copy, send reports to your team. With Perplexity Computer, you type one sentence, launch a marketing campaign for my new product, and it goes to work. It researches your competitors automatically. It analyzes market trends. It designs assets. It generates a landing page. It puts together a full report. And it sends everything to your team from one prompt. That is not science fiction. That is what this tool does right now. And it is not just for marketing. Developers can use it to build apps, debug code, and deploy projects. Teams can use it for meeting summaries, automated reports, and data pipelines. Creators can use it for script writing, video research, and trend analysis. The use cases are endless. Now, here is why this matters on a bigger level. We are watching a massive shift happen in AI right now. The old way was one model, one chat window, one answer at a time. The new way is multiple models, autonomous agents, full workflow execution. Perplexity is basically building an AI operating system for knowledge work. And that is a huge deal. Think about it like this. Chat GBT is like having one really smart employee. Perplexity computer is like having an entire AI company. You got a researcher, an analyst, a coder, a designer, a project manager, all working together at the same time, all inside one system and they never sleep. They never take breaks. They never forget anything. Now, let me talk about security because I know that is a big concern for businesses. The enterprise version comes with so 2 compliance, audit logs, data retention policies, and here is the important part, zero model training on your company data. That means your private information stays private. Your data does not get used to train their models. That is a big deal for any business that handles sensitive information. So where does this fit compared to other tools out there? Chat GPT has agents but it is a single model system. Claude code is great for coding but it is focused on that one thing. Gemini workspace ties into Google but it is limited to that ecosystem. Perplexity computer is different because it is model agnostic. It does not care which AI model is best. It just uses whatever works best for each task. That is its superpower. It is not loyal to one model. It is loyal to getting you the best result. And this is just the beginning. Soon we are going to see AI operating systems, AI teams, maybe even AI companies where entire workflows are handled by agents that talk to each other and get things done without any human in the loop. Perplexity just took a massive step in that direction. And if you are not paying attention to this, you're going to fall behind fast.
